subcodes.first_line: I testify that thou hast witnessed the dawn of Kufa and the eventide of Karbila. Render thanks unto thy Lord, the All-Merciful, for having made thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اشهد بانک انت ادرکت فجر الکوفه و عشی الکربلا ان اشکر ربک الرحمن بما جعلک
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @high station of the true believer, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @imagery in the Qur'an
